series_metadata.series_description: File contains records received from the Bureau of Criminal Investigation (BCI), and other sources, for the corporations and individuals receiving a video lottery license, individual applicants for traditional lottery licenses, lottery employees and vendors.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: If paper copy exists in operating area, three (3) years ; Electronic: copy digitally in Ohio Lottery database and in hard copy (if exists) in a secure area with access limited persons who need these records carry out their duties and responsibilities, five (5) years
